MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS New Delhi, 11th February, 1988 NOTIFICATION G.S.R. 84(E) :—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passport Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following tules further to amend the Passport Rules, 1980 namely : 1. (I) "These rules may be called the Passpotts (Amend- ment) Rules, 1988. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. -- 2 of 4 -- 3 fc) Public Relations Officer, — The State of Goa. Panaji.
